item.name: Fat Chocobo Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone recognized by your fat chocobo as a feeding call.

mount.name: Fat Chocobo
mount.action: Summon forth your fat chocobo mount. Take care that there is sufficient room for his ample girth.
mount.description: Playfully described by some as “large and in charge,” in truth, when summoned, this gluttonous gourmand will flap nary a feather unless a garland of gysahl greens is dangled before him─in which case not even the laws of nature can slow the fat chocobo down.
